vocab.meaning: sự tập trung không bị gián đoạn
vocab.example: I prefer studying by myself because it guarantees a period of uninterrupted focus that is hard to achieve in a group.

vocab.meaning: điều chỉnh tốc độ (học tập) theo ý muốn
vocab.example: Studying solo allows me to tailor my pace, spending more time on challenging concepts without feeling pressured.

vocab.meaning: phản hồi từ bạn bè/đồng trang lứa
vocab.example: The main advantage of collective study is the immediate peer-to-peer feedback which helps clarify misunderstandings.
While I am not exactly a social butterfly, I do enjoy the occasional group session to break the monotony of isolation.

vocab.meaning: sự cộng hưởng về mặt nhận thức
vocab.example: Group studies often result in cognitive synergy, where the collective brainpower leads to more profound insights.
I have found that my optimal productivity is reached in a silent library rather than a noisy study hall.
Studying with others encourages divergent thinking, as everyone brings a different interpretation to the table.

vocab.meaning: sự giam hãm đơn độc (dùng ẩn dụ cho việc tự học quá lâu)
vocab.example: Sometimes, long hours of self-study feel like solitary confinement, so I join a group to keep my spirits up.
Collaborative sessions facilitate a rapid information exchange that can save hours of individual research.

vocab.meaning: môi trường không gây xao nhãng
vocab.example: I am a firm believer in a distraction-free environment, which is why I usually opt to study in my own room.
